notes: VS Code MCP uses 'servers' key (NOT 'mcpServers') — different from Claude/Cursor
VS Code MCP requires explicit 'type' field on all entries
VS Code MCP supports 'inputs' array for user-prompted values
Coding Agent MCP is configured in GitHub repo settings (web UI), not a file
Hook entries use 'bash' field (not 'command'), 'timeoutSec' (not 'timeout' in ms)
Hook events are camelCase (preToolUse, not PreToolUse)
Agent tools use aliases (read, edit, execute, search, agent, web)
Skills only support name, description, license — all other fields are over-emitting
No file-based permissions — CLI flags only
No file-based ignore — web UI content exclusion only
Copilot evolves rapidly — check docs monthly
